label: Serial Wardrobing Pattern
description: High image manipulation + extremely high behaviour score. Classic serial wardrobing with ring affiliation.

label: Clean Legitimate Claim
description: All signals low. Trusted customer with clean history. Fast lane eligible.

label: Document Forgery Elite
description: Near-perfect document forgery score. Font inconsistency + PDF metadata mismatch. Part of organised ring.

label: INR Delivery Override
description: Strong carrier signal (confirmed delivery) with high behaviour anomaly. Classic INR despite delivery proof.

label: New Account High Value
description: Account < 30 days old, immediate high-value claims, perfect network ring match.

label: Seasonal Wardrobing
description: Photo taken weeks after delivery. Seasonal return spike pattern around events/festivals.

label: Friendly Fraud Career
description: Confirmed delivery + high behaviour anomaly. Multiple prior INR claims. Graduated from isolated to career fraud.

label: VPN Ring Coordinator
description: All signals extremely high. VPN rotation detected. Ring coordinator profile — orchestrates multiple accounts.

label: Borderline Review Case
description: Mixed signals across all dimensions. Human review recommended. Could be legitimate edge case.

label: Trusted Elite Customer
description: Near-zero across all signals. Account age 3+ years, consistent address, low claim history. Exemplar legitimate customer.
